name: Inside Out Ravioli
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spinach according to package directions. Drain and reserve liquid.
2. Add water to make 1 cup; set aside.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon oil on medium-high heat.
4. Saute beef, onions, and garlic until lightly browned.
5. Add reserved spinach liquid, spaghetti sauce, tomato sauce, salt, and pepper. Simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
7. Combine spinach, macaroni, cheese, bread crumbs, eggs, and 1/4 cup oil in a bowl.
8. Pour the mixture into a greased 13x9x2 inch baking dish.
9. Top with meat sauce.
10. Bake for 30 minutes.
